LanguageData.VFEFactory_FactoryNotWorking: This factory is not working at the moment.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_OverclockDesc: Overclock this factory to make it produce faster at the expense of more energy. Current overclocking at: {0}
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MasonryBlocks: 20 blocks of the same stone as the chunk used
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Butchery: Meat of the corpse in the form of processed mince
LanguageData.VFEFactory_ButcheryHuman: Meat of the corpse in the form of human meat
LanguageData.VFEFactory_ChangeDirectionDesc: Change the direction of this conveyor belt.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CommandCreateLinkDesc: Link an underground conveyor entrance and exit together to allow items to pass.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CommandBreakLinkDesc: Unlink an underground conveyor entrance and exit, allowing for new links to be established.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CommandSelectLinkedDesc: Show and select the linked structure.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_ConnectionMissing: Doesn't work due to missing link to an underground conveyor exit.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CantLinkSelf: Can't link: Cannot link to self.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CantLinkDifferentRotation: Can't link: Entrance and exit must have the same rotation.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_IncreaseZoneDesc: Extend the zone in which autofarmer will harvest and sow crops.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DecreaseZoneDesc: Contract the zone in which autofarmer will harvest and sow crops.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_StartAutofarmerDesc: Initiate the autofarmer now. It will move through the designated zone, harvesting and sowing crops. It will return back to the autofarmer platform when done.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CancelAutofarmerDesc: Cancel the process and have the autofarmer return to the platform.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutoharvestingDesc: Enable or disable automatic harvesting and plant cutting in the designated zone.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutosowingDesc: Enable or disable automatic sowing of the selected crop.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutocycleWhenGrownDesc: Enable or disable an automatic harvesting/sowing cycle when crops in the zone reach 100% maturity.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AutofarmerObstructed: Autofarmer cannot initiate due to a large object obstructing its path.
